recommendations.title: Valley Girl
recommendations.overview: Julie, a girl from the valley, meets Randy, a punk from the city. They are from different worlds and find love. Somehow they need to stay together in spite of her trendy, shallow friends.

recommendations.title: Unpregnant
recommendations.overview: After discovering she can’t legally get an abortion in Missouri without her parents’ permission, teenager Veronica convinces her former best friend Bailey to take a road trip to Albuquerque to seek the procedure.

recommendations.title: Swiped
recommendations.overview: Whitney Wolfe uses extraordinary grit and ingenuity to break into the male-dominated tech industry.

recommendations.title: Sherlock Holmes
recommendations.genres: Fantasy, Horror, Action, Mystery, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Sherlock Holmes and Watson are on the trail of a criminal and scientific mastermind who seems to control monsters and creations which defy belief.

recommendations.title: The Last Song
recommendations.overview: A drama centered on a rebellious girl who is sent to a Southern beach town for the summer to stay with her father. Through their mutual love of music, the estranged duo learn to reconnect.

recommendations.title: Dinner in America
recommendations.overview: An on-the-lam punk rocker and a young woman obsessed with a local band go on an unexpected and epic journey together through the decaying suburbs of the American Midwest.

recommendations.title: Qué León
recommendations.overview: A love story between a couple with the same last name but very different social statuses.

recommendations.title: The Anthem of the Heart
recommendations.overview: A young girl had her voice magically taken away so that she would never hurt people with it, but her outlook changes when she encounters music and friendship. Will Naruse be able to convey the anthem of her heart?

recommendations.title: Questo Piccolo Grande Amore
recommendations.overview: From the album of the same name by Claudio Baglioni the film tells the love story of two teenagers during the legendary seventies. A story so overwhelming as to compel the world to retreat, to step aside. Andrea and Giulia come from two different wor

recommendations.title: SLC Punk
recommendations.overview: Two former geeks become 1980s punks, then party and go to concerts while deciding what to do with their lives.
